title: SELECT, Projection, Expressions, Types, and Result Contracts
description: An operations analyst needs a readable, reproducible ticket extract whose columns carry explicit meaning. Learners cumulatively produce a typed ticket projection query pack through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Compose SELECT and FROM clauses that project only required columns from a named relation.
Use relation and column aliases to make provenance and output contracts unambiguous.
Build arithmetic, text, date, and CASE expressions while tracing input and output meaning.
